name: Florida Power & Light

ruleReferences.requirement: Net metering enrollment required before energizing
All installations must comply with Florida Building Code wind load requirements

ruleReferences.description: Standard for interconnection of distributed energy resources

disconnectRequirements.notes: FPL requires a visible, lockable AC disconnect. Florida high-wind requirements apply — verify ASCE 7-22 wind speed for county.

labelingRequirements: FPL requires 'SOLAR ELECTRIC SYSTEM CONNECTED' placard at utility meter
Hurricane tie-down labels required for structural attachments
notes: FPL serves most of South and East Florida. Florida Building Code 7th Edition structural requirements apply. High wind zones require enhanced attachment design.
